creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
After I've been told proftpd doesn't build WITH_CLAMAV, I've ran it in a tinderbox with each option toggled into nondefault state, and it showed this and several other failures:

WITH_CLAMAV (linker_error):
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/proftpd/proftpd-clamav-1.3.4a_1.log

WITH_ODBC (missing_header):
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/proftpd/proftpd-odbc-1.3.4a_1.log

WITHOUT_QUOTATAB_SQL, WITH_TLS_MEMCACHE, WITH_MEMCACHE, WITHOUT_QUOTATAB_FILE (PLIST):
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/proftpd/proftpd-memcache-1.3.4a_1.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/proftpd/proftpd-noquotatab_file-1.3.4a_1.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/proftpd/proftpd-noquotatab_sql-1.3.4a_1.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/proftpd/proftpd-tls_memcache-1.3.4a_1.log
